Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions/Mpa And Faust
Off Calendar Dec-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Geoffrey Faust, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Amy Faust

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Amy Faust's motion to compel compliance with prior order and for terminating sanctions is granted in part. The motion for terminating sanctions is denied at this time. Defendant is ordered to comply with the prior order within 5 days of notice of this order. Additional monetary sanctions in the amount of $740 shall be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2008 Continued To Jan-14-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions/Mpa And Faust Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Geoggrey M. Faust, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Amy Faust

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Amy Faust's Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery is granted as follows:
a. All objections are waived, except for attorney-client and attorney work product privileges;
b. Within seven days of the date of this order, defendants Cornerstone Law Group and Brian V. Donnelly each shall serve separate, full, complete, and verified responses to plaintiff's Form Interrogatories [First Set], and Request for Production of Documents [First Set];
c. Plaintiff's Request For Admissions propounded to defendant Cornerstone Law Group are deemed admitted as to Request For Admissions nos. 1, 2, 3, 6 through 10, inclusive; 12 through 18, inclusive; and 20 through 27, inclusive. As to Request for Admissions nos. 4, 5, 11, and 19, motion denied.
d. Plaintiff's Request For Admissions propounded to defendant Brian V. Donnelly are deemed admitted as to Request For Admissions nos. 1, 2, 3, 6 through 10, inclusive, 12 through 18, inclusive; and 20 through 27, inclusive. As to Request for Admissions nos. 4, 5, 11, and 19, motion denied.
2. Request For Sanctions granted. Sanctions shall issue against defendants Cornerstone Law Group and Brian V. Donnelly, and their counsel of record [jointly and severally] in the sum of $540.00. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions/Mpa And Faust Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, Plaintiff Amy Faust's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents (set #1, 2) and form interrogatories and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on September 2, 2008. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
